-- 4 of 6 --

Now for the funnest part! In this lesson, I’ll teach you
how to produce the best ad creative possible with my
foolproof content-converting framework.
Key Types of Content Needed:
• 	What are your brands’ Value Propositions?
• 	Are these value propositions told in:
• 30 seconds?
• 15 seconds?
• 5 seconds?
• IG story dimensions?
• Sill images?
• GIPHs?
• 	What are your best selling products?
• Is that product used in the ad?
• 	Do you have various assortments of reviews utilized
at every step of funnel?
• Trust Pilot
• Emails
• Facebook Comment
• Loox Reviews
• Judge.me
Prospecting Ad Tips
• 	Show product and value proposition within first 3
seconds of video
• 	Include people enjoying the product
• 	Show customer’s products being sold
• 	Leverage reviews as copy
• 	Choose upbeat music
• 	Use text overlays to handle common objections
• 	Show what it looks like
• 	Engage commenters
LESSON:
CREATIVE THAT CONVERTS
MODULE:
SCALING WITH
FACEBOOK ADS
ACTION ITEM
❏ 	Use these tips and examples as inspiration
for producing your brand’s own Facebook Ad
creative.
TOOLS & RESOURCES
• 	Facebook Ads Guide: How to Create
Great-Looking Facebook Ads,
WordStream
• 	How to Create the Perfect Facebook Ad
in Minutes, Hootsuite
“50% of the conversion rate is based on the creative that
you’re going to run.”
